zh.lifeSummary: 當John Washborne於大約1518年出生在英國武斯特斯爾本沃斯時，他的父親John Washbourne40歲，母親Lady Emme Brittany Bengeworth 40歲。他於1542年4月21日與Joan Bushell在英國武斯特斯爾本沃斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1593年10月13日之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Washborne于大约1518年出生在英国武斯特斯爾本沃斯时，他的父亲John Washbourne40岁，母亲Lady Emme Brittany Bengeworth 40岁。他于1542年4月21日与Joan Bushell在英国武斯特斯爾本沃斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1593年10月13日之前在他的家乡，埋葬在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: Washborne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Washburn
meanings: English: habitational name from Great and Little Washbourne (Gloucestershire), or Washbourne in Halwell (Devon). The Gloucestershire placename derives from Old English wæsse (genitive wæssan) ‘wet place, swamp, marsh’ + burna ‘spring, stream’. The Devon placename derives from Old English wæsce ‘place for washing’ + burna.
History: John Washburn came to MA in 1626 and settled in Duxbury, MA, in 1632.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When John Washborne was born about 1518, in Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England, his father, John Washbourne, was 40 and his mother, Lady Emme Brittany Bengeworth , was 40. He married Joan Bushell on 21 April 1542, in Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died before 13 October 1593, in his hometown, and was buried in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Washborne est né environ 1518, à Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, John Washbourne, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Lady Emme Brittany Bengeworth , avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Joan Bushell le 21 avril 1542, à Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé avant 13 octobre 1593, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Washborne um 1518 in Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Washbourne 40 und seine Mutter Lady Emme Brittany Bengeworth  40. Er hat am 21. April 1542 in Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England Joan Bushell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb vor 13. Oktober 1593 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Washborne è nato il circa 1518 nel Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England, il suo padre, John Washbourne, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Lady Emme Brittany Bengeworth , aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Joan Bushell il 21 aprile 1542, nel Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì prima del 13 ottobre 1593, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Washborneが約1518年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアベンジェウオルスで生まれた時，父John Washbourneは40歳，母Lady Emme Brittany Bengeworth は40歳であった。1542年4月21日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアベンジェウオルスでJoan Bushellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1593年10月13日以前に故郷で死去し，イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Washborne(이)가 대략 1518년 영국 워스스터실르 벤그워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Washbourne(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Emme Brittany Bengeworth (은)는 40세였다. 그는 1542년 4월 21일 영국 워스스터실르 벤그워스에서 Joan Bushell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1593년 10월 13일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Washborne nasceu aproximadamente 1518, em Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Washbourne, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Lady Emme Brittany Bengeworth , tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Bushell em 21 de abril de 1542, em Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 13 de outubro de 1593, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Washborne родился около 1518 г. в местности бенгюорт, ворсестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Washbourne было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Emme Brittany Bengeworth , 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Bushell 21 апреля 1542 г. в местности бенгюорт, ворсестиршир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер перед 13 октябрь 1593 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Washborne nació aproximadamente 1518, en Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Washbourne, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Lady Emme Brittany Bengeworth , tenía 40 años. Se casó con Joan Bushell el 21 de abril de 1542, en Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió antes de 13 de octubre de 1593, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
